title: feed.rs poll_all() creates Client::new() without timeout — hangs indefinitely on stuck feed
description: feed.rs:154: let client = reqwest::Client::new() in poll_all() has no timeout configured. If a feed server hangs after accepting the TCP connection but before sending a response, the CLI 'broadside feed-poll' command will block indefinitely. The background poller (run_poller) correctly sets a 30s timeout on its client (line 137-140), but poll_all() is the CLI path. An operator running feed-poll interactively gets a hung process. Fix: use Client::builder().timeout(Duration::from_secs(30)).build() in poll_all() consistent with run_poller.
close_reason: Pass 3 fixes: HMAC key compare, inbox SSRF guard, domain validation, async Accept dispatch, foreign keys, IPv6 SSRF, poll timeout. Remaining P2-P3 accepted as known debt.
